mechanized-doll:

sapphic-dice:

goodtransgirl:

Well, I got my first TERF hate reblog today…

Eyyyyyyy

Welcome to the club… they suck… but are also generally kinda dumb lol.

Always suuuuuuuper fun when that happens

I have so many cute photos on my blog and she of course picked the silly catgirl photo in a giant box I took before I was out and well before FFS. I mean, she could have spread around my cute pinned post as least. 🤭
